name: Figue Vert (Green Banana) Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green bananas in a saucepan and add just enough chicken stock to cover.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the bananas are tender, about 20 to 25 minutes.
3. Using a potato masher, mash until smooth (the chicken stock will be absorbed).
4. Let cool slightly.
5. In a small frypan, heat butter and sauté onions until tender.
6. Add the sautéed onions, cream, and beaten eggs to the cooked bananas until combined; season with salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon to taste.
7. The mixture will be quite moist.
8. Place the banana mixture in a buttered shallow baking dish.
9. Combine cheese with bread crumbs; sprinkle over the top.
10. Bake at 350°F for 35 - 40 minutes or until the top is golden.
11. Serves 4 - 6.
